mapper.select:
select o.id, o.order_no as orderNo, u.username, p.name as petName, o.amount, o.status, o.contact_name as contactName, o.contact_phone as contactPhone, o.address, o.remark, o.create_time as createTime from orders o left join user u on o.user_id = u.id left join pet p on o.pet_id = p.id
o.is_deleted = 0
and o.order_no like concat('%', #{orderNo}, '%')
and u.username like concat('%', #{username}, '%')
and p.name like concat('%', #{petName}, '%')
and o.status = #{status}
and date_format(o.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = #{createTime}
order by o.create_time desc

select o.id, o.order_no as orderNo, u.username, p.name as petName, o.amount, o.status, o.contact_name as contactName, o.contact_phone as contactPhone, o.address, o.remark, o.create_time as createTime from orders o left join user u on o.user_id = u.id left join pet p on o.pet_id = p.id where o.id = #{id} and o.is_deleted = 0 limit 1

select id, order_no as orderNo, user_id as userId, pet_id as petId, amount, status, contact_name as contactName, contact_phone as contactPhone, address, remark, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from orders where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into orders ( order_no, user_id, pet_id, amount, status, contact_name, contact_phone, address, remark, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{petId}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{address}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update: update orders set is_deleted = 1 where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
